expectations.text: States clearly that no direct equivalent exists
expectations.evidence: 'No Playwright-equivalent external CLI driver for Compose Multiplatform desktop' stated up front.

expectations.text: Lists where it looked (coverage as evidence)
expectations.evidence: Coverage explicit: JAB-vs-UIA analysis on Windows, no AT-SPI on Linux, macOS unexplored by tooling, 'zero community reports.'

expectations.text: Nearest alternatives described with actual gaps
expectations.evidence: Official uiTestJUnit4 (in-process), compose-driver v0.5.0 (experimental HTTP driver), Ultron (alpha) - each with status and limits.

expectations.text: No fabricated tools or misrepresented platform support
expectations.evidence: compose-driver is a real repo (jdemeulenaere, JetBrains); claims hedged with experimental/alpha status.

expectations.text: Wrote an investigation header (Question/Domain/Strategy/Hypothesis/Done-when) before findings, or evidence of it appears in the answer
expectations.evidence: No investigation header in the deliverable.

notes: Best run of the eval: confirmed the negative AND surfaced compose-driver, a closest-match tool the baseline missed entirely, plus a Promote-to-context section for Compose Pilot. Slowest run (344s). Header missing.
